data.current_description: Revoke a refresh token for an application.
data.description_suggestion: Revoke a specific refresh token for an application, invalidating it for future use. Requires the refresh token identifier in the request body. Returns a 204 No Content response on successful revocation. The associated access token remains valid until its expiration.

Enhanced to clarify the input requirement (token identifier), response code, and that access tokens are unaffected to help AI agents understand the operation's scope.

data.current_description: Reset multi-factor authentication for a user.

This operation requires administrative privileges and will invalidate any active MFA sessions. The user will need to re-enroll in MFA on their next login.
